name: nerd-code-completion
description: Inline code autocomplete powered by Claude or any OpenAI-compatible LLM (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, etc.)

enumDescriptions: Use Claude via the Claude Agent SDK (inherits Claude Code config)
Use any OpenAI-compatible API (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, etc.)
nerdCodeCompletion.backend.description: Which backend to use for completions

nerdCodeCompletion.model.description: Model name. For Claude: empty uses ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL or claude-haiku-4-5. For openai-compatible: required (e.g., 'codellama:7b', 'deepseek-coder:6.7b')

nerdCodeCompletion.openaiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API. Required when backend is 'openai-compatible'. Examples: http://localhost:11434/v1 (Ollama), http://localhost:8000/v1 (vLLM)

nerdCodeCompletion.openaiApiKey.description: Static API key for the OpenAI-compatible server. Overridden by apiKeyHelper if set. Leave empty for local servers like Ollama

nerdCodeCompletion.apiKeyHelper.description: Shell command that outputs an API key on stdout (e.g., 'my-tool get-api-key'). Used by openai-compatible backend. Overrides openaiApiKey when set. Key is generated on IDE open and refreshed on auth errors.

nerdCodeCompletion.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before triggering completion

nerdCodeCompletion.contextLines.description: Number of lines of context before and after cursor to include

nerdCodeCompletion.cacheSize.description: Number of completions to cache (0 to disable)

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
